description: AI Agent runtime progress messages are fixed, translated, integer-coded, and rendered by the control plane before public SSE delivery. The public client keeps receiving message strings.

messages.description: Provider has not produced a more specific structured tool/progress signal yet.
The selected agent already owns another active assignment and this task is queued.

locales.ko: 지금은 다른 작업을 처리 중이에요. 현재 작업이 끝나는 대로 바로 시작할게요.
locales.en: I am working on another task right now. I will start as soon as the current task finishes.

messages.description: The agent was deleted while the assignment was active.

locales.ko: 에이전트가 삭제되어 진행 중이던 작업이 중지됐어요.
locales.en: The agent was deleted, so the active task was stopped.

messages.description: A user explicitly stopped the active assignment.
A tool-backed collection/read operation is in progress. The label argument must be a state-neutral noun phrase and must not include rendered state copy such as collecting/running/completed.

A tool-backed collection/read operation completed with a count and representative title. The label argument must be a state-neutral noun phrase and must not include rendered state copy such as collecting/running/completed.

locales.en: {{label}} lookup complete - fetched summaries for {{count}} items including {{representative_title}}. . .

messages.description: A tool/action is executing. The label argument must be a state-neutral noun phrase and must not include rendered state copy such as collecting/running/completed.
A tool/action completed with a short summary. The label argument must be a state-neutral noun phrase and must not include rendered state copy such as collecting/running/completed.
Reserved for future explicit start-copy once product copy is finalized.
Reserved for future explicit completion-copy once product copy is finalized.
Reserved for future explicit failure-copy once product copy is finalized.
